# godaddy_domain_agreements (Data Source)

Read legal agreements required for domain operations.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `privacy` (Boolean) Whether privacy is requested.
- `tlds` (List of String) List of TLDs.

### Optional

- `for_transfer` (Boolean) Whether the agreements are for transfer.

### Read-Only

- `agreements` (List of Object) Agreement documents returned by GoDaddy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--agreements))

<a id="nestedatt--agreements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `agreements`

Read-Only:

- `agreement_key` (String)
- `content` (String)
- `title` (String)
- `url` (String)
